info.name: Runloop Secrets API
info.description:
Securely manage account-level Secrets (API keys, tokens, credentials) that are injected at Devbox runtime without exposing raw values to agent code.

Contact Support:
 Name: Runloop AI Support
 Email: support@runloop.ai

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Secret to delete.

request.description: Delete an existing Secret by name. This action is irreversible and will remove the Secret from all Devboxes.

response.name: Secret deleted successfully. Returns the deleted Secret (without value for security).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Forbidden. Account does not have devbox capability.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Secret to retrieve.

request.description: Retrieve a Secret by name. The secret value is not included for security.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the Secret. Value is omitted for security.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Secret to update.

request.description: Update the value of an existing Secret by name. The new value will be encrypted at rest.

response.name: Secret updated successfully. Returns the Secret with its new value included.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Forbidden. Account does not have devbox capability.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Create a new Secret with a globally unique name and value. The Secret will be encrypted at rest and made available as an environment variable in Devboxes.

response.name: Secret created successfully. Returns the Secret with its value included.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Bad request. Secret name already exists, is invalid, or contains illegal characters.

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Forbidden. Account does not have devbox capability.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.

request.description: List all Secrets for the authenticated account. Secret values are not included for security reasons.

response.name: Successfully retrieved list of Secrets. Values are omitted for security.

query.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.
